verse_text: 'So the Lord heard the sound of your words and was provoked to wrath, and took an oath, saying,

links.context: Joshua and Caleb were the only two men who left Egypt and entered into Canaan (Nm 14:28-32; [[DEU.1:34]]-40). They had not participated in the disobedience of Egypt. The possession of Canaan under Joshua, though, was not the promised rest. Otherwise, David would not have spoken centuries later of a rest still remaining for us.
